parts.text: what school do you go to?

demo.watch: Someone new is talking to you. Watch what I do.
demo.doing: I never answer that. I take it to a grown-up. 🚩
demo.over: Now it's your turn. You try!

parts.text: hey! you're so good at this game 😄
parts.hint: That part is just being friendly. Look at what they ask you next.

parts.found: Nice eye! Asking your age is a red flag. 🚩

spot.prompt: Something here isn't safe. Drag it to a grown-up.
spot.missHint: Hmm, look again, what feels a bit too personal, or pushy?

decide.prompt: A stranger just asked how old you are. What should we do?

choices.feedback: Nice, you kept your age to yourself!
Your age is private. Someone you just met online doesn't need it.

messages.parentTag: asking personal info like your age

parts.hint: That word is just friendly. Look at the question right after it.

parts.text: are your mum and dad home right now?
parts.found: Exactly! Asking if you're home alone is a red flag. 🚩

spot.prompt: One part of this isn't safe. Drag it to a grown-up.
spot.missHint: Look again, which part is a stranger not supposed to know?

decide.prompt: A stranger just asked if you're home alone. What should we do?

choices.feedback: Whether you're home alone is private. A stranger never needs to know that.
Great, you didn't say who's home!

parts.hint: Free stuff sounds fun, but read the next part carefully.

parts.found: Yes! Being asked to keep a secret is a big red flag. 🚩

spot.prompt: A big red flag is hiding here. Drag it to a grown-up.
spot.missHint: Look for the part that asks you to hide something from a grown-up.

decide.prompt: A stranger just asked you to keep a secret from your parents. What should we do?

choices.feedback: Yes, no secrets from your grown-ups!
Being asked to keep a secret from your parents is a big red flag. Always tell a grown-up you trust.

messages.parentTag: asking you to keep a secret from parents

react.takeaway: A stranger online doesn't need your age, whether you're home, or your secrets. When something feels off, tell a grown-up you trust.
